items.title: The Chinese sports brand taking on Nike and Adidas
items.dek: Now one of the biggest sportswear firms, Anta's rise follows a playbook adopted by many Chinese giants.
items.body: Now one of the biggest sportswear firms, Anta's rise follows a playbook adopted by many Chinese giants.

items.title: Pirates seize another vessel off Somali coast as threat level increased
items.dek: The UK's maritime monitor reports at least four suspected piracy incidents in the past week off the coast of Somalia.
items.body: The UK's maritime monitor reports at least four suspected piracy incidents in the past week off the coast of Somalia.

items.title: Kim Jong Un opens memorial for N Korean soldiers killed in Ukraine war
items.dek: Kim Jong Un and Russian Defence Minister Andrey Belousov unveiled the memorial in Pyongyang.
